title: Mr. Monk and the Candidate (Part 1)
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Gavin Lloyd
persons.notes: Hired Sykes to commit the murder

deaths.motive_detail: Hired hit by Gavin Lloyd to cover up political secrets

title: Mr. Monk and the Candidate (Part 2)
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Gavin Lloyd
persons.notes: Ordered assassination; Warren St. Claire's campaign manager

persons.name: Jake
persons.notes: Man killed to cover up connection to the conspiracy

deaths.cause_detail: Staged as a car accident; killed at a stop sign then car pushed into a ditch

title: Mr. Monk and the Psychic
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Katherine Ashcombe
persons.notes: Wife of former Police Commissioner; killed in staged car accident

persons.name: Harry Ashcombe
persons.notes: Former Police Commissioner; murdered his wife

deaths.cause_detail: Staged car accident; ramps placed on road caused car to go airborne off a hillside
deaths.motive_detail: Harry wanted to be free of his wife; likely for a new relationship

title: Mr. Monk Meets Dale the Whale
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Judge Catherine Lavinio
persons.notes: Judge who was murdered in her home

persons.name: Dale Biederbeck
persons.notes: Morbidly obese billionaire who ordered the murder

persons.name: Dr. Christiaan Vezza
persons.notes: Dale's personal physician who carried out the murder

deaths.cause_detail: Murdered by proxy on Dale Biederbeck's orders
deaths.motive_detail: Judge Lavinio had ruled against Biederbeck; he sought revenge
deaths.notes: Dale Biederbeck could not have committed the murder himself due to his extreme obesity; he used his doctor as a proxy

title: Mr. Monk Goes to the Carnival
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Kitty Malone
persons.notes: Hired assassin who stabbed Gitomer with a switchblade

persons.name: Leonard Stokes
persons.notes: Hired Kitty Malone to commit the murder

deaths.cause_detail: Stabbed in the aorta with a switchblade on a Ferris wheel
deaths.motive_detail: Gitomer was an informant; Stokes hired Malone to silence him

title: Mr. Monk Goes to the Asylum
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Dr. Conrad Gould
persons.notes: Former director of the psychiatric hospital; shot in the medical supply room

persons.name: Dr. Lancaster
persons.notes: Current hospital director who murdered Gould to take his position

deaths.cause_detail: Shot three times in the chest in the medical supply room
deaths.motive_detail: Lancaster wanted the hospital directorship for himself

title: Mr. Monk and the Billionaire Mugger
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Sidney Teal
persons.notes: Billionaire computer mogul shot dead by Modine

persons.name: Archie Modine
persons.notes: Ex-cop who shot Sidney Teal during a staged mugging

persons.name: Myra
persons.notes: Modine's accomplice and lover, motive for the murder

deaths.cause_detail: Shot with a revolver during a staged fake mugging
deaths.motive_detail: Modine wanted to be with Myra; Sidney was her husband and an obstacle

title: Mr. Monk and the Other Woman
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Lou Pratt
persons.notes: Attorney stabbed and strangled with his telephone cord

persons.name: Tod Katterskill
persons.notes: Killed Pratt to prevent the attorney identifying a forged will; also killed Lawrence Grayson

persons.name: Thomas Katterskill
persons.notes: Dying elderly uncle whose will Tod forged

deaths.cause_detail: Stabbed and also strangled with his telephone cord
deaths.motive_detail: Pratt would have identified Tod's forged will as a fraud, blocking Tod from inheriting his uncle's estate

title: Mr. Monk and the Marathon Man
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Gwen Zaleski
persons.notes: Actress and mistress of Trevor McDowell; thrown from balcony

persons.name: Trevor McDowell
persons.notes: Local furniture magnate who murdered his mistress while running a marathon alibi

deaths.cause_detail: Strangled then thrown off the balcony of her 21st floor apartment
deaths.motive_detail: McDowell wanted to end the affair and silence Gwen to protect himself
deaths.notes: McDowell used a microchip hidden on a video camera cart to create a false alibi during the marathon

title: Mr. Monk Takes a Vacation
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Lupe
persons.notes: Hotel maid murdered by her colleagues in the insider trading ring

persons.name: Vickie
persons.notes: Head of the chambermaid insider trading ring; killed Lupe

deaths.cause_detail: Killed by fellow chambermaids and body hidden with lime
deaths.motive_detail: Lupe wanted out of the insider trading ring or demanded more money; killed to silence her

title: Mr. Monk and the Earthquake
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Henry Rutherford
persons.notes: San Francisco philanthropist bludgeoned by his wife during the earthquake

persons.name: Christine Rutherford
persons.notes: Henry's wife; used the earthquake as cover to murder him

persons.name: Darryl Wright
persons.notes: Christine's lover; helped retrieve incriminating answering machine tape

deaths.cause_detail: Bludgeoned with a marble statue; display case toppled onto body to simulate earthquake death
deaths.motive_detail: Christine was having an affair with Darryl Wright and wanted to be rid of her husband

title: Mr. Monk and the Red-Headed Stranger
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Sonny Cross
persons.notes: Willie Nelson's road manager; embezzler; killed in an alley

persons.name: Ms. Mass
persons.notes: Blind woman who partially regained sight; killed Cross in revenge for killing her parents

persons.name: Willie Nelson
persons.notes: Country music star; initially suspected of murder

deaths.cause_detail: Shot twice with a Webley revolver — once in the collarbone and once in the back
deaths.motive_detail: Cross had caused a car crash that killed Ms. Mass's parents and blinded her decades earlier

title: Mr. Monk and the Airplane
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Barbara Chabrol
persons.notes: Stefan's wife, killed at the airport and replaced by his mistress

persons.name: Stefan Chabrol
persons.notes: Pilot who murdered his wife and hid the body at an airport construction site

deaths.cause_detail: Murdered at the airport; body hidden at a construction site
deaths.motive_detail: Stefan wanted to be with his mistress and killed his wife to be free of her

title: Mr. Monk Goes Back to School
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Beth Landow
persons.notes: English teacher at Trudy's alma mater; staged as a suicide fall from a clock tower

persons.name: Derek Philby
persons.notes: Schoolteacher who murdered his mistress to protect his marriage and career

deaths.cause_detail: Struck with a wooden plank then placed on the clock tower's minute hand to fall at 8:20 AM; staged as suicide
deaths.motive_detail: Beth threatened to expose their affair, which would ruin Philby's marriage and career

title: Mr. Monk Goes to Mexico
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Chip Rosatti
persons.notes: Young San Francisco businessman who appeared to drown while skydiving

persons.name: Dr. Madero
persons.notes: Fugitive doctor Luis Nivara in disguise; falsified autopsy results and committed murders

deaths.cause_detail: Parachute cord cut so he fell to his death; lungs filled with water post-mortem to create impossible drowning scenario
deaths.motive_detail: Dr. Madero (Luis Nivara) blamed Monk for testifying against him; killed prominent SF citizens to lure Monk to Mexico

title: Mr. Monk Goes to the Ballgame
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Erin Hammond
persons.notes: CEO's trophy wife; the primary murder target

persons.name: Lawrence Hammond
persons.notes: Billionaire CEO shot once and mortally wounded alongside his wife

persons.name: Walker Browning
persons.notes: Out-of-work computer programmer who killed to protect his prized home run ball's value

persons.name: Scott Gregorio
persons.notes: Baseball star pursuing the single-season home run record; had affair with Erin

deaths.cause_detail: Ambushed and shot by a masked gunman at a deserted industrial park
deaths.motive_detail: Browning wanted Gregorio distracted so he would fail to break the home run record, preserving the value of Browning's famous ball

title: Mr. Monk Goes to the Circus
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Sergei Cluvarias
persons.notes: Circus ringmaster shot dead at a sidewalk cafe

persons.name: Natasha Lovara
persons.notes: Trapeze artist and Sergei's ex-wife; faked a broken leg to provide an alibi

deaths.cause_detail: Shot with a .454 Ruger Casull; Natasha had her own leg crushed by an elephant to fake an alibi
deaths.motive_detail: Natasha killed her ex-husband Sergei out of jealousy and personal vengeance

title: Mr. Monk and the Very, Very Old Man
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Miles Holling
persons.notes: World's oldest man at 114; suffocated with a pillow in the retirement home

persons.name: Dennis Gammill
persons.notes: Deputy mayor who killed Holling to keep a prior hit-and-run covered up

deaths.cause_detail: Smothered with a pillow in his nursing home room after Gammill impersonated a security guard
deaths.motive_detail: Holling was a witness to Gammill's old hit-and-run killing of valedictorian Darren Leveroni; Gammill killed to prevent exposure

title: Mr. Monk Goes to the Theater
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Hal Duncan
persons.notes: Actor stabbed on stage during a play; first incapacitated by a peanut oil allergic reaction

persons.name: Jenna Ryan
persons.notes: Understudy who orchestrated the murder to take the lead role

persons.name: Gail Fleming
persons.notes: Sharona's sister; falsely accused of the murder

deaths.cause_detail: Jenna spiked the prop apple with peanut oil causing anaphylaxis; her father then fatally stabbed Duncan on stage while posing as a doctor
deaths.motive_detail: Jenna Ryan and her father conspired to frame Gail so Jenna could take the lead role in the play

title: Mr. Monk and the Sleeping Suspect
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Amanda Babbage
persons.notes: Killed by a mail bomb sent by her brother Brian

persons.name: Brian Babbage
persons.notes: Sent mail bombs to eliminate siblings in dispute over father's estate; was in a coma during investigation

deaths.cause_detail: Killed by a package bomb rigged to explode when opened; bomb glued inside a mailbox in advance
deaths.motive_detail: Brian was in a dispute with his siblings over their late father's estate

title: Mr. Monk Meets the Playboy
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Elliot D'Souza
persons.notes: CFO found dead in his locked private gym; barbell crushed his throat

persons.name: Dexter Larsen
persons.notes: Publisher of Sapphire magazine; used a magnet to remotely drop the barbell on D'Souza

deaths.cause_detail: Barbell dropped on his throat using a powerful magnet operated remotely; room locked from the inside
deaths.motive_detail: D'Souza planned to shut down Sapphire Mansion; Larsen killed him to prevent it

title: Mr. Monk and the 12th Man
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Frank Pulaski
persons.notes: Highway tollbooth operator; first jury member murdered

persons.name: Ian Agnew Babcock
persons.notes: Murderer killing jury members one by one to find the blackmailer who photographed his wife's corpse

deaths.cause_detail: Handcuffed to a rope attached to Babcock's speeding car and dragged to death
deaths.motive_detail: Babcock was killing jury members one by one to find the juror who was blackmailing him over the murder of his first wife

title: Mr. Monk and the Paperboy
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Nestor
persons.notes: Paperboy pushed to his death trying to stop a newspaper thief

persons.name: Vickie
persons.notes: Lottery scheme accomplice who killed her partner and tried to steal winning lottery ticket from newspaper

persons.name: Kevin Dorfman
persons.notes: Monk's neighbor who won the lottery

deaths.cause_detail: Pushed to his death while trying to stop the newspaper thief
deaths.motive_detail: Vickie was trying to steal the newspaper to prevent Kevin Dorfman from discovering his lottery winnings

title: Mr. Monk and the Three Pies
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Rita Van Ranken
persons.notes: Pat Van Ranken's wife; murdered to keep her from discovering the shell casing

persons.name: Gladys Dohan
persons.notes: Old woman who won the cherry pie at the raffle; bludgeoned by Van Ranken

persons.name: Pat Van Ranken
persons.notes: Killed his wife and others to recover a shell casing baked into a cherry pie

persons.name: Ambrose Monk
persons.notes: Adrian's agoraphobic brother; witnessed Van Ranken's suspicious behavior

deaths.cause_detail: Bludgeoned against her steering wheel after she used pepper spray on Van Ranken who wanted her pie
deaths.motive_detail: Van Ranken was tracking down cherry pies that might contain the shell casing from his murder of his wife

title: Mr. Monk and the TV Star
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Susan Malloy
persons.notes: Former actress and Brad Terry's ex-wife; stabbed at home

persons.name: Brad Terry
persons.notes: TV actor on Crime Lab: SF; killed his ex-wife to keep syndication money

deaths.cause_detail: Stabbed at her home; Brad broke a window to fake a break-in and used a dubbed yoga tape to mask the noise
deaths.motive_detail: Susan was entitled to half of Brad's TV syndication money from their shared marriage period

title: Mr. Monk and the Missing Granny
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Granny Parlo
persons.notes: Kidnapped elderly woman; returned unharmed. The real target was her valuable rocking chair.

persons.name: Julie Parlo
persons.notes: Law student and Granny Parlo's granddaughter who enlists Monk's help

notes: Notable as one of the few Monk episodes with no murder. The case is a kidnapping; Granny Parlo's rocking chair (originally owned by Thomas Jefferson) was the real target.

title: Mr. Monk and the Captain's Wife
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Tow Truck Driver
persons.notes: Sniper's first victim; shot in the neck to recover a murder weapon from his tow truck

persons.name: Evan Coker
persons.notes: Robber/murderer who shot the tow truck driver to recover incriminating evidence from his glove compartment

persons.name: Karen Stottlemeyer
persons.notes: Captain Stottlemeyer's wife; critically injured in the resulting car accident

deaths.cause_detail: Sniper shot in the neck; driverless truck caused accident injuring Karen Stottlemeyer
deaths.motive_detail: Coker had placed a murder weapon in his glove compartment when his car was towed; he shot the driver to get the gun back

title: Mr. Monk Gets Married
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Raymond Toliver
persons.notes: Antique dealer bludgeoned by his partner Dalton Padron

persons.name: Dalton Padron
persons.notes: Con man and antique dealer who married Disher's mother and murdered his partner

persons.name: Maria Disher
persons.notes: Lt. Disher's mother; married Dalton Padron

deaths.cause_detail: Bludgeoned to death with a sewing machine
deaths.motive_detail: Padron killed his partner to keep sole access to the hidden gold cache worth millions from the 1849 gold rush

title: Mr. Monk Goes to Jail
creator: Andy Breckman

persons.name: Ray Kaspo
persons.notes: Death row inmate poisoned via his last meal 45 minutes before scheduled execution

persons.name: Mrs. Fairbourn
persons.notes: Prison teacher who poisoned Kaspo to kill millionaire Lambert Lawson by ruining the kidney transplant

persons.name: Dale Biederbeck
persons.notes: Imprisoned nemesis of Monk; suspected in Kaspo's murder; provides tip about Trudy in exchange for Monk's help

persons.name: Lambert Lawson
persons.notes: Reclusive millionaire who sued Mrs. Fairbourn's son; died after the kidney transplant was ruined

deaths.cause_detail: Poisoned through his last meal to destroy his organs and spoil a kidney transplant
deaths.motive_detail: Killing Kaspo ruined Lambert Lawson's scheduled kidney transplant, which Mrs. Fairbourn intended to cause Lawson's death in retaliation for his lawsuit against her son
